svg.title: Vault.ai system architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: React frontend, Spring Boot backend with microservices, and data/infra layer with PostgreSQL, Redis, and AWS.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Notes UI component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Number vault UI component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Reminders UI component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Morning digest UI component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Agent chat UI component')
sendPrompt('How does the API gateway work in this app?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI agent brain work in detail?')
sendPrompt('How does the job scheduler trigger reminders?')
sendPrompt('How are push notifications and emails sent?')
sendPrompt('What tables does the PostgreSQL database have?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis store in this app?')
sendPrompt('How is the app deployed on AWS EC2?')
sendPrompt('What does AWS SES handle in this app?')
sendPrompt('What is the vector store used for in RAG?')
